name: U-Shaped Attention Curve
description: Models exhibit reduced recall for information placed in the middle of context, with stronger attention at the beginning and end positions.
behavior_change: Place critical information at context edges, never in the middle.

name: Attention Sink Phenomenon
description: The first token (BOS) absorbs disproportionate attention weight, creating a privileged position for content placed immediately after it.
behavior_change: Place system-level identity and critical rules in the first position.

name: Distraction Step Function
description: Even a single irrelevant document triggers measurable performance degradation. The effect follows a step function, not linear.
behavior_change: Filter aggressively before loading; one distractor is enough to harm performance.

name: Poisoning Cascade
description: Once an error enters context, subsequent reasoning treats it as ground truth and compounds the error through self-reference.
behavior_change: Validate all external inputs; recover by truncation, not correction layering.

name: Tool Schema Token Inflation
description: JSON-serialized tool schemas inflate 2-3x compared to equivalent plain-text descriptions due to structural tokens.
behavior_change: Monitor total tool token cost; consolidate tool catalogs.

name: Tool Consolidation Principle
description: If a human engineer cannot definitively say which tool to use, an agent cannot either. Reduce until each tool has one unambiguous purpose.
behavior_change: Merge overlapping tools; test disambiguation with humans first.

name: Telephone Game Problem
description: Supervisor agents paraphrase sub-agent responses, losing fidelity with each pass. Forward-message tools bypass this.
behavior_change: Implement forward_message tool for direct sub-agent to user communication.

name: Prefix Cache Reuse
description: Static content placed before dynamic content can be cached and reused across turns, saving computation.
behavior_change: Structure context with static prefix, dynamic suffix.

name: Observation Masking
description: Replacing verbose tool outputs with compact summaries after processing saves tokens without losing processed information.
behavior_change: Mask tool outputs after the turn that processes them.

name: Compression Fidelity-Capacity Tradeoff
description: Every compression strategy trades information fidelity for capacity. No compression is lossless at meaningful ratios.
behavior_change: Choose compression based on task fidelity requirements, not just token savings.
